purpose: Expected EntityState outputs for fake GTM fixtures. These states are review targets, not implementation logic.

expected_entity_states.primary_reason: Clean account identity, recent high-strength intent spike, recent email reply from resolved contact, and meeting booked outcome evidence make this the first critical success path account.
unknowns: human approval still required before any action
expected_entity_states.recommended_next_decision_or_action_if_a: recommend human review for follow-up; do not automate outreach

expected_entity_states.primary_reason: Messy but resolvable account identity and recent medium-confidence intent signal support review, but no contact reply or meeting signal exists.
unknowns: last meaningful human touch not known
expected_entity_states.recommended_next_decision_or_action_if_a: recommend human review only if higher-priority accounts are exhausted

expected_entity_states.primary_reason: Pioneer Systems remains separate from Pioneer System Solutions, and the only linked signal is stale and low confidence.
unknowns: unclear whether historical website visit reflects current interest
expected_entity_states.recommended_next_decision_or_action_if_a: do not prioritize from stale signal alone

expected_entity_states.primary_reason: Similar account names without canonical domain or another strong key must remain unresolved. The system must not invent an Account entity.
unknowns: whether source records describe the same company
which source should be trusted for identity

expected_top_10_fixture_preview.reason: Clean resolution plus recent intent and reply signals.
Messy but resolved identity plus medium intent signal.

explicit_state_guardrails: Unresolved source records must not receive invented high-priority state.
Stale or low-confidence signals may remain traceable without driving high priority.
Every priority state must preserve unknowns.
Recommendations remain recommendations and must not imply automated action.
